title: BioForge
description: Immerse yourself in the world of minecraft using player implants!
body:
Mod starts with a new workstation for villager (Organic Machination Lab). You can use it to make villager a Bio-Engineer, who at the penultimate (Expert) and last (Master) level will be able to sell you implants.



_Implants list:_

**[RPE]** – Used to improve the organ of sight

**[CMW]** – Used to enhance physical strength

**[NBC]** – Used to enhance blood circulation

**[SSM]** – Used to enhance capacity

**[PLE]** – Used to improve the respiratory organ

**[BLA]** – Used to enhance speed

**[NSG]** – Used to improve the player's skin
